alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide 1 h at room temperature in darkness.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide 1 h at room temperature in darkness.
cleavage agent: digested in situ with trypsin (sequencing grade)
collision energy: normalized collision energy of 40% for HCD fragmentation
instrument: an ion trap LTQ-Orbitrap-Velos-Pro hybrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Electrospray ionization, EIS, was conducted using a Nano-bore emitters
labeling: using isobaric tags for relative and absolute quantitation (iTRAQ)
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) 1 h at 56 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) 1 h at 56 °C
